description: 79-day occupation of major city thoroughfares in Hong Kong demanding electoral reforms for the 2017 Chief Executive election. Protesters faced police tear gas and organized via social media platforms.

key_events.description: Police fire 87 canisters of tear gas at protesters, cementing the 'Umbrella' symbol.
Protests grow to occupy three major districts (Central, Causeway Bay, Mong Kok).
Public fatigue sets in due to significant disruption of daily commute and logistics.
Protest sites are cleared by court injunctions and police enforcement.

calibration_notes: Useful for modeling long-duration protests that lose public support due to 'protest fatigue' and economic disruption.
